hyperedges.label: Security Defense-in-Depth: Path, Shell, URL, Audit
Layered Security Defense (Path Sandbox + Shell Allowlist + Process Protection + Audit + Confirmation)
RAG Pipeline: Ingest and Query Components
KORTEX 5-Layer Prompt: System + Memory + RAG + History + User
Three Personality Modes: Loki / Jarvis / Friday
Conversation Flow Subsystem (state machine + LLM + router)
Preview-First Safe-Write Pattern (generate â†’ pending_write â†’ explicit save)
Directory Safety Restrictions (whitelist + SKIP_DIRS + stat guard)
Security Integration Tests (SSRF, token auth, process kill guard)
